description: Product type taxonomy for the SG-MRM simulation pipeline. Defines all supported product types, their sources, and export semantics.

path_loss_map.description: Composite path loss map (dB) assembled from all active layers via MultiScaleMap.compose(). L3 residual applied only within support_mask.

visibility_mask.description: Boolean mask: True where satellite is visible (not occluded by horizon).

elevation_field.description: Per-pixel elevation angle to satellite (degrees above horizon).

azimuth_field.description: Per-pixel azimuth angle to satellite (degrees clockwise from North).

terrain_blockage.description: Boolean mask: True where terrain blocks line-of-sight to satellite.

urban_residual.description: Urban NLoS residual loss (dB). Non-zero only within urban tile coverage (support_mask).

categories.frame_map: Single-frame spatial map covering the full simulation grid
categories.per_layer_contribution: Per-layer contribution to the composite, useful for ablation studies
categories.time_series_cube: Stack of frame_maps across time (not yet implemented)
categories.benchmark_artifact: Frozen reference outputs for reproducibility validation

export_format.array_files: NumPy .npy format, one file per product type
export_format.sidecar: JSON sidecar (dataset.json) with shape, dtype, manifest, and frame metadata
export_format.manifest: ProductManifest written to manifest.jsonl via ManifestWriter
